choices.text: 18,000 ft MSL to FL600. IFR only; ATC clearance required. Most airliners cruise here.
Specific ATC clearance required + Mode C transponder + ADS-B Out. Surrounds busiest airports (JFK, LAX, ATL); upside-down wedding cake shape.
Notice to Air Missions: TFRs, airport closures, runway repairs, ILS outages. Required by FAR 91.103 pre-flight. Apps like ForeFlight integrate NOTAMs + TFRs + weather.
VFR: visual nav, see+avoid, weather mins required. IFR: instrument nav through clouds, requires instrument rating + current avionics + filed flight plan + ATC clearance throughout flight.
Magnetic course 0-179° (eastbound): odd thousands + 500 (3,500/5,500). 180-359° (westbound): even thousands + 500 (4,500/6,500). Above 3,000 ft AGL. Prevents head-on collisions.
